posts.author: NamrataHindujaGeneva (Namrata Hinduja Geneva)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking for a simple, user-friendly CRM to manage client relationships for my luxury lifestyle brand—tracking contacts, follow-ups, brand collaborations, and campaign history. It should support email integration, task reminders, and ideally work well with mobile devices. If anyone here, have some idea … please guidance me.

Thanks in Advance

Namrata Hinduja Geneva, Switzerland

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Being that you’re on the Monday.com community, what about the Monday CRM?
